channel.title: The J Word
channel.description: Recent content on The J Word

item.title: Sichuan-Gansu-Qinghai Grand Loop
item.description: It was a amazing and impressive golden holiday. We haven't had such a crazy time in a long time. This time, 7 days, one car and three people, passing through forests, lakes, mountains and glaciers, was an unforgettable experience for us. 🚗 Car selection Toyota (T-ROC) 🧭 Self-driving map 👣Total mileage：About 3,000 kms 📸 Some moments

item.title: IELTS Speaking
item.description: Recording the learning process is always my personal preference. Anyone who has the needs to practice speaking can use these records if it helps. Every single word was basically typed by hand through listening. Please correct any mistake by mailing me (jackwu925@outlook.com) and thank you for the effort. Part2 No.1 Healthcare professionals Your browser does not support the video tag. Subtitles The person I'd like to talk about is my cousin Sara.

item.title: Rain’s Afterglow
item.description: At USTC after a rainstorm, I tried to take a time-lapse of a rainbow while having dinner, so I left my camera next to the window. Although there was no rainbow in the end, the finished video was quite a surprise!😄 Video Your browser does not support the video tag. by Jack Wu

item.title: Northern Sichuan
item.description: Honestly, it's my very first time to come to the northern of Sichuan province. We spend three days this time, driving for 1,500 kms and never expected such endless happy.😄 🚗 Car selection Toyota RAV4 🧭 Self-driving map 👣Total mileage：About 1,500 kms 📸 Some moments

item.title: Sichuan Grand Loop
item.description: Driving through western Sichuan, the winding roads reveal new scenery at every turn. The road is unpredictable, but each unknown holds a little surprise. 🚗 Car selection Borgward (BX5) 🧭 Self-driving map 👣Total mileage：About 2,000 kms 📸 Some moments

item.title: Graduation Ceremony
item.description: It has been a long time since I graduated. During my time in the US, I changed a lot, becoming more confident, understanding, and tolerant. I will never forget how different life is in the US. Moments

item.title: Introduction
Basic Types
item.description: Strings str := "Hello" Multiline string str := `Multiline string` Numbers Typical types num := 3 // int num := 3. // float64 num := 3 + 4i // complex128 num := byte('a') // byte (alias for uint8) Other Types var u uint = 7 // uint (unsigned) var p float32 = 22.7 // 32-bit float Arrays // var numbers [5]int numbers := [...]int{0, 0, 0, 0, 0} Pointers func main () { b := *getPointer() fmt.

item.title: Flow Control
item.description: Condition if day == "sunday" || day == "saturday" { rest() } else if day == "monday" && isTired() { groan() } else { work() } if _, err := doThing(); err != nil { fmt.Println("Uh oh") Switch switch day { case "sunday": // cases don't "fall through" by default! fallthrough case "saturday": rest() default: work() } Loop for count := 0; count <= 10; count++ { fmt.Println("My counter is at", count) } entry := []string{"Jack","John","Jones"} for i, val := range entry { fmt.

item.title: File Manipulation
item.description: Condition if day == "sunday" || day == "saturday" { rest() } else if day == "monday" && isTired() { groan() } else { work() } if _, err := doThing(); err != nil { fmt.Println("Uh oh")

item.title: Bash Variables
item.description: Variable NAME="John" echo $NAME echo "$NAME" echo "${NAME} Condition if [[ -z "$string" ]]; then echo "String is empty" elif [[ -n "$string" ]]; then echo "String is not empty" fi
